Feedback is welcomed!

⌜ Upon venturing in the Dungeons of Fear and Hunger, Ragnvaldr finds himself in the hidden backyard by himself

In pursuit of finding the Cube of Depths and avenging his family, he finds a stranger, and perhaps, an ally. ⌟
